Uses of Class
recoder.java.reference.PackageReference

Packages that use PackageReference
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
recoder
This package contains some basic definitions.
recoder.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
recoder.java.reference
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing implicit or explicit (named) references to other program elements.
recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework.
recoder.service
This package contains the semantical services of RECODER.

    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.
